---
title: Classroom of the Elites
format: html
embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
targets::tar_load(quotes_data)

i <- sample(x = nrow(quotes_data), size = 1)
d <- quotes_data[i, ]
```

**Season:** `r d$season`

**Episode:** `r d$episode`

**Quote:** `r d$quote`

**Author:** `r d$author` 

Report created on: **`r Sys.time()`**
